filing.application_type.label: FIRST: ('X' one box only.) This application is for a new OR renewal of a registration of corporate name.
filing.application_type.binding_source: PDF word x-positions: 2two (x=294.2) sits between 'a'(290.0) and 'new'(318.9) -> new; 2three (x=353.7) sits between 'OR'(339.9) and 'renewal'(377.6) -> renewal. /Tx not checkbox.
